title: Designing a Performance Management System
scenario: Create a performance management system for a team of employees that includes metrics for productivity, quality, and teamwork. The system should provide a dashboard for managers to monitor employee performance and identify areas for improvement. The final output should be a JSON object with the system's key components and metrics.
constraints: Must include a detailed explanation of the metrics used to evaluate employee performance.
Must provide a clear description of how the dashboard will be used to monitor employee performance.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the metrics used to evaluate employee performance are clearly described and relevant to the task.
Verify that a clear description of how the dashboard will be used to monitor employee performance is provided.
Check if the system's key components are correctly generated and make sense in the context of the team.
Verify that the JSON object is correctly formatted and easy to read.
